mapper.select: SELECT a.*, m.name AS writer_name FROM announcement_tb a LEFT JOIN member_tb m ON a.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY a.announcement_id DESC
SELECT a.*, m.name AS writer_name FROM announcement_tb a LEFT JOIN member_tb m ON a.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY a.announcement_id DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT a.*, m.name AS writer_name FROM announcement_tb a LEFT JOIN member_tb m ON a.member_id = m.member_id WHERE a.announcement_id = #{announcementId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement_tb (announcement_id, member_id, title, content) VALUES (announcement_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement_tb SET view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 WHERE announcement_id = #{announcementId}
